title: Submerged Explosions
description: Allows blocks to be destroyed by explosions that are submerged in liquids.
body:
**Description**
---
Submerged Explosions allows blocks to be destroyed by explosions that are submerged in liquids. Aside from the added realism, this will now prevent players from using water and other liquids to protect their structures from explosion damage.


**Related Mods**
---
- [Realistic Explosion Physics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/realistic-explosion-physics)
- [Throwable Explosives](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/throwable-explosives)


**Configuration**
---
<details>
<summary>BreakLiquids</summary>
Whether liquid blocks can be destroyed by explosions.
</details>

<details>
<summary>LiquidBlastAbsorption</summary>
A multiplier to apply to the blast resistance of all liquids.
</details>
